arts.ttl: Why Real Madrid and Barcelona Aren't Playing the Copa del Rey 2024-25 Second Round
arts.sum: Real Madrid, Barcelona, Athletic Club and Mallorca automatically advanced to the Copa del Rey round of 32.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid make contact with Dalot - Tuesday's gossip
arts.sum: Real Madrid make contact with Manchester United's Diogo Dalot, Mohamed Salah is willing to accept a one-year deal at Liverpool, while Wayne Rooney is under pressure at Plymouth Argyle.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for La Liga match against Athletic Bilbao
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Wednesday’s match against Athletic Bilbao in La Liga. Midfielders: Bellingham, Valverde, Modrić, Tchouameni, Arda Güler and Ceballos.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti admits he has been ‘surprised’ by Real Madrid youngster
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has admitted that he has been left surprised by the emergence of youngster Raúl Asencio in his squad. Asencio has of course enjoyed something…

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Real Madrid eye Man United's Dalot
arts.sum: - AC Milan midfielder Tijjani Reijnders is on the radar of multiple clubs in the Premier League despite being close to signing a new contract at the San Siro, reports Calciomercato . Real Madrid could turn their attention to Diogo Dalot while Manchester United are looking at moves for both Viktor Gyökeres and Kenan Yıldız .

arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy names the one 'amazing' thing about Leicester that reminds him of Real Madrid
arts.sum: Van Nistelrooy takes charge for the first time tonight...

arts.ttl: When is Athletic - Real Madrid? how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: Real Madrid, currently in second place, suffered a harsh loss against Liverpool in the Champions League but they continue with a strong form in the league after beating Getafe 2-0 before heading to San Mamés. The game between Athletic - Real Madrid will be played on Wednesday December 4 at San Mames, with kick off at 3:00 p.m. ET / 12:00 p.m. PT .

arts.ttl: Mbappé vs Bellingham: Carlo Ancelotti confirms Real Madrid penalty-taker plans
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has provided an insight into the plans of he and his players, should Los Blancos be afforded a penalty in their next outing. The…

arts.ttl: Official: One return as Real Madrid name squad to face Athletic Club
arts.sum: La Liga champions Real Madrid have on Tuesday unveiled the club’s travelling squad to face Athletic Club tomorrow night. And it features one altogether noteworthy return. Carlo Ancelotti’s troops are…

arts.ttl: Jamie Gittens: The latest English sensation following Jude Bellingham and Jadon Sancho at Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Gittens has become an integral part of Dortmund ’s side this season, scoring important goals in the Bundesliga and in the UEFA Champions League, which have put him in the spotlight as one of Europe’s brightest up and coming youngsters. Jamie Gittens is just the third Englishman to play for Borussia Dortmund and is well on his way to emulating the feats of illustrious predecessors Jude Bellingham and Jadon Sancho after an impressive start to the 2024/25 season.
